name: logit
description: LogIt — Enterprise IT Service Management platform

scripts.dev: npm run dev -w @logit/api & npm run dev -w @logit/web & npm run dev -w @logit/worker
scripts.build: npm run build -w @logit/shared && npm run build -w @logit/api && npm run build -w @logit/worker && npm run build -w @logit/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @logit/shared && tsc -p apps/api/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p apps/worker/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.ci: npm run typecheck && npm run test -w @logit/api && npm run build -w @logit/api && npm run build -w @logit/worker && npm run build -w @logit/web
